Class DRPiePlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.AbstractBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.report.base.chart.plot.DRPiePlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIBasePlot, DRIPiePlot, DRIPlot, Serializable
public class DRPiePlot extends AbstractBasePlot implements DRIPiePlot

DRPiePlot class.

Ricardo Mariaca
